passages.passage_text: Questions (Q. 41-45): The following are the directions to be followed for the selection of directors for a recording company: a) The candidate must be over 35 years of age as on 1.4.96. b) The candidate must be at least a graduate in music. c) The candidate must have at least one recorded cassette of his or her music. d) The candidate must have given music for at least two T.V. serials. e) The candidate fulfills all these criteria, he or she will be selected as a music director. However, if a candidate fulfills all these criteria except any one, his or her case will be referred to the Producer. (a) If above, his or her case will be referred to the Director. (b) If above, but has given music for some films (feature film only), he or she will be selected as a Music Director. On the basis of these conditions decide what course of action has to be taken in the case of the following candidates. Give answer 1) If the candidate is to be selected as a Music Director. 2) If the candidate is not to be selected as a Music Director. 3) If or her case is to be referred to the Producer. 4) If his or her case is to be referred to the Director. 5) If the data given about the candidate are inadequate to give a definite course of action.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Prina Sah is 42 years old as on 1.1.95. He is a graduate in music. He has given music for several T.V. serials (three serials). He has given music in some feature films.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Manju Majumdar was born on 7.2.1960. She has given music in five T.V. serials. She has given music in two feature films and has seven cassettes of her music.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Mani Shrivastava has several cassettes of his music. He has given music in four T.V. serials and three feature films. He is a graduate in music and he works with a Manju Majumdar.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Shravan Mehapatra has a graduate degree in music. He is 40 years old. He has not given music in either any T.V. serial or any film. He has recorded some cassettes of his music.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Moti Saxena has given music in several T.V. serials. He was born on 7.8.1960. He is a graduate in music and has recorded ten cassettes of his music. He has also given music in five documentary films.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Directions (Q. 46-55): The following are the criteria laid down by a publishing house for the selection of Desk Officers: I. The candidate must be between 25 and 30 years old as on 1.1.95. II. The candidate must be a graduate from a recognised Indian University with at least 55% marks.
